---
title: "dslab-mall"
format: html
---

```{python}
import polars as pl
gh_base = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2020/2020-05-05/'

```

```{python}
critics = pl.read_csv(gh_base + 'critic.tsv', separator = '\t')

critics
```

```{python}
import mall

critics.llm.use("ollama", "llama3.2")
```

```{python}
critics.llm.sentiment("text")
```

```{python}
critics = critics.llm.sentiment("text")
```

```{python}
critics.sort("grade", descending = False)
```

```{python}
user_reviews = pl.read_csv(gh_base + 'user_reviews.tsv', separator = '\t')
user_reviews
```

```{python}
user_reviews.head(100).llm.extract("text", "language (english, spanish, etc)")
```

```{python}
top_reviews = user_reviews.head(100).llm.extract("text", "language (english, spanish, etc)")
```

```{python}
top_reviews.group_by("extract").count()
```

```{python}
top_reviews.filter(pl.col("extract") == "russian")
```

```{python}
top_reviews.filter(pl.col("extract") != "english")
```

```{python}
spanish_reviews = top_reviews.filter(pl.col("extract") == "spanish")
```

```{python}
spanish_reviews.llm.translate("text", "english")
```

```{python}
from chatlas import ChatBedrockAnthropic
chat = ChatBedrockAnthropic(
    model = "us.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0", 
    aws_profile = "claude"
)
```

```{python}
user_reviews.llm.use(chat)
```

```{python}
user_reviews.head(100).llm.sentiment("text")
```
